headline: Assessing Ingersoll Rand (IR) Valuation After A Strong Recent Share Price Run
summary: Recent performance snapshot Ingersoll Rand (IR) shares recently closed at US$87.03, with the stock showing a 2.8% move over the past day and 11.7% over the past week, along with more modest changes over the past month and the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Ingersoll Rand. That strong 7 day share price return of 11.7% builds on a 9.1% year to date share price return and a 1 year total shareholder return of 22.8%, suggesting momentum has been firm over both short and longer...
